metrics.label: LinkedIn Followers
metrics.note: Tracking followers instead of connections — more useful metric going forward.

findings.title: 6.2% LinkedIn Engagement Rate Is Strong
findings.description: 68 engagements on 1,104 impressions is well above the LinkedIn average of 2-3%. The audience is small but highly engaged — quality over quantity at this stage.

findings.title: Website Traffic Needs a Growth Channel
findings.description: 96 sessions is a baseline to build from. Organic search and LinkedIn referral traffic are the main levers — blog content and consistent posting will compound over time.

findings.title: Follower Tracking Is the Right Metric
findings.description: Switching from connections to followers gives a clearer picture of audience growth. Followers represent people actively choosing to see Miles & Memories content in their feed.
